property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Child Object API Name
property.description: API name of the object to query (e.g. Contact, Custom_Object__c).

property.name: parentFieldApiName
property.label: Parent Field API Name
property.description: API name of the lookup field pointing to the parent (e.g. AccountId, Parent__c).

property.name: parentFieldValue
property.label: Parent Field Value
property.description: The ID of the parent record to filter by.

property.name: childRecordLabelField
property.label: Child Record Label Field
property.description: API name of the field shown as the option label in the picklist. Defaults to Name.

property.name: sortOrder
property.label: Sort Order
property.description: Sort direction for the records in the picklist.

property.name: label
property.label: Label
property.description: The label displayed above the picklist. Defaults to 'Select a record'.

property.name: required
property.label: Required
property.description: When enabled, the user must make a selection before proceeding.

property.name: value
property.label: Selected Record ID
property.description: The ID of the selected record.
